name: Utilities Assist Ontology
description: Process steps and document provenance from enterprise documentation

searchPhrases.name: Process for document
searchPhrases.cypher: MATCH (d:Doc {id: $id})<-[:OF_DOC]-(s:Step) OPTIONAL MATCH path=(s)-[:NEXT*0..10]->(:Step) RETURN path ORDER BY s.order

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Document ID to show process for

searchPhrases.name: Steps mentioning
searchPhrases.cypher: MATCH (e) WHERE e.name CONTAINS $entity MATCH (s:Step)-[:MENTIONS]->(e) OPTIONAL MATCH (s)-[:OF_DOC]->(d:Doc) RETURN s, e, d

searchPhrases.name: Longest processes
searchPhrases.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Step)-[:NEXT*3..20]->(t:Step) WITH p, length(p) AS len ORDER BY len DESC LIMIT 10 RETURN p

searchPhrases.name: Document overview
searchPhrases.cypher: MATCH (d:Doc {id: $id}) OPTIONAL MATCH (d)<-[:OF_DOC]-(s:Step) RETURN d, collect(s) AS steps ORDER BY s.order

searchPhrases.name: Steps in section
searchPhrases.cypher: MATCH (s:Step) WHERE s.section CONTAINS $section OPTIONAL MATCH (s)-[:OF_DOC]->(d:Doc) RETURN s, d ORDER BY s.order

searchPhrases.name: Unaccepted relationships
searchPhrases.cypher: MATCH (a:Step)-[r:NEXT]->(b:Step) WHERE r.accepted = false RETURN a, r, b LIMIT 50
